page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion Mahjong Complementary Plan
text:
is a video game created by Studio Saizensen https://glitchwave.com/game-company/studio-saizensen/ and published by King Records on 29 September 2000 for the . https://ja.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E6%96%B0%E4%B8%96%E7%B4%80%E3%82%A8%E3%83%B4%E3%82%A1%E3%83%B3%E3%82%B2%E3%83%AA%E3%82%AA%E3%83%B3_%E3%82%A8%E3%83%B4%E3%82%A1%E3%81%A8%E6%84%89%E5%BF%AB%E3%81%AA%E4%BB%B2%E9%96%93%E3%81%9F%E3%81%A1 

Gameplay

This game is a that uses digitized screenshots from the anime as a backdrop. The music consists of 8-bit recreations of tracks from the series. It has compatibility with the Game Boy printer, which allows the user to print the game's artwork.

It has a story mode, a battle mode (where the player must face the game's thirteen Angels), and a free party mode. The game does not include Ritsuko Akagi, Ryoji Kaji, and Toji Suzuhara but does include Kaworu Nagisa.
